case_title: EXPERT GROUP INC. VS JUMAGA, MARK DBA JARETT PRODUCTIONS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY EXPERT GROUP INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JUMAGA, MARK DBA JARETT PRODUCTIONS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EXPERT GROUP INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JUMAGA, MARK DBA JARETT PRODUCTIONS INC. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JUMAGA, MARK DBA JARETT PRODUCTIONS INC.
POS ON SUBPENA TO PARAS JAQUELINE FILED.
